---
name: Content correction (scenario / fault accuracy)
about: Report an inaccurate scenario, fault, or rule
title: "[content] "
labels: content
---

**What is wrong?**
Scenario id / step / fault code, and what it currently says.

**What should it be?**
The correct procedure or rule.

**Official source**
Cite the ICBC source (e.g. *Tuning Up for Motorcyclists* section/page) or other
authoritative reference. Accuracy matters — riders rely on this.

**Region**
e.g. Richmond, BC.
